testsuite.name: History service — thread messages request validation

testcase.name: Requesting a thread with no thread message id is rejected as invalid
Requesting a thread in a room the caller is not subscribed to

failure.message: Step the response is a Auth error: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: history-forbidden-class-unverifiable, step error: error-class: want Auth, got HandlerError (transport=nats status=0 errText="not subscribed to room" trace=1be265c558aede7a229d453e9c544f8a)

testcase.name: Submitting a message with an empty body is rejected

failure.message: Step "alice" submits a message with an empty body: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: message-submit-needs-jetstream-primitive, step error: messaging: cannot submit "an empty body" — message-gatekeeper is reached via a fire-and-forget JetStream publish with a decoupled reply; Part-1 has no JetStream/peek primitive (see blindspots.md::message-submit-needs-jetstream-primitive)

error.message: Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Submitting a message with an invalid message id is rejected

failure.message: Step "alice" submits a message with an invalid message id: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: message-submit-needs-jetstream-primitive, step error: messaging: cannot submit "an invalid message id" — message-gatekeeper is reached via a fire-and-forget JetStream publish with a decoupled reply; Part-1 has no JetStream/peek primitive (see blindspots.md::message-submit-needs-jetstream-primitive)

error.message: Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Authenticated user creates a channel room
Authenticated user creating a channel room (draft demo)

testsuite.name: Room service — member role update validation

testcase.name: Updating a member to an unknown role is rejected as invalid
